message:
Add configurable CASS binary path, optional session in diff cmd, complete config JSON dump, and pure-Go TOON encoder fallback

CASS binary path:
- Add BinaryPath field to CASSConfig in both cass and robot packages
- isCASSAvailable() and QueryCASS() now use the configured path,
  falling back to "cass" on $PATH when unset
- CLI cass preview command passes BinaryPath from loaded config

diff command UX:
- Make session argument optional in ntm diff (2 or 3 args)
- Auto-infer session from current tmux session or project dir
  via ResolveSessionWithOptions when omitted
- Use consistent session resolution for both JSON and non-JSON
  output modes

Config dump completeness:
- Expose all integration configs (dcg, caam, rch, caut,
  process_triage, rano, proxy, xf) in JSON config output
- Add missing agent entries (cursor, windsurf, aider)
- Add missing checkpoint settings (interval_minutes, on_rotation,
  on_error)
- Add health, scanner, cass, gemini_setup, context_rotation,
  agent_mail, and ensemble sections
- Print CASS sub-sections (duplicates, search, tui) in config
  text output

TOON fallback:
- Add toonEncodePureGo() using reflect for slices, maps, structs,
  and scalars
- toonEncode() gracefully falls back to pure-Go implementation
  when the Rust toon binary is not on PATH

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -2834,6 +2834,27 @@ func Print(cfg *Config, w io.Writer) error {
 	fmt.Fprintf(w, "prefer_same_project = %t   # Prefer results from same project\n", cfg.CASS.Context.PreferSameProject)
 	fmt.Fprintln(w)
 
+	fmt.Fprintln(w, "[cass.duplicates]")
+	fmt.Fprintln(w, "# Duplicate detection settings")
+	fmt.Fprintf(w, "enabled = %t                # Check for duplicates before sending\n", cfg.CASS.Duplicates.Enabled)
+	fmt.Fprintf(w, "similarity_threshold = %.2f # 0-1, higher = stricter matching\n", cfg.CASS.Duplicates.SimilarityThreshold)
+	fmt.Fprintf(w, "lookback_days = %d          # How far back to check\n", cfg.CASS.Duplicates.LookbackDays)
+	fmt.Fprintf(w, "prompt_on_match = %t        # Ask user before proceeding\n", cfg.CASS.Duplicates.PromptOnMatch)
+	fmt.Fprintln(w)
+
+	fmt.Fprintln(w, "[cass.search]")
+	fmt.Fprintln(w, "# Search defaults")
+	fmt.Fprintf(w, "default_limit = %d\n", cfg.CASS.Search.DefaultLimit)
+	fmt.Fprintf(w, "default_fields = %q\n", cfg.CASS.Search.DefaultFields)
+	fmt.Fprintf(w, "include_meta = %t\n", cfg.CASS.Search.IncludeMeta)
+	fmt.Fprintln(w)
+
+	fmt.Fprintln(w, "[cass.tui]")
+	fmt.Fprintln(w, "# TUI settings")
+	fmt.Fprintf(w, "show_activity_sparkline = %t\n", cfg.CASS.TUI.ShowActivitySparkline)
+	fmt.Fprintf(w, "show_status_indicator = %t\n", cfg.CASS.TUI.ShowStatusIndicator)
+	fmt.Fprintln(w)
+
 	// Write Gemini setup configuration
 	fmt.Fprintln(w, "[gemini_setup]")
 	fmt.Fprintln(w, "# Gemini CLI post-spawn setup configuration")
